CustomField.formula: IF( ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Per_Hour') && NOT(ISBLANK(Daily_Report__r.Contract__r.Admin_Fee__c)) && ( TEXT(Contract_Job_Item__r.Service_Type__c) = 'Flexi Price/Quantity'), (Rate__c * Number_of_Hours__c) + (Daily_Report__r.Contract__r.Admin_Fee__c * (Rate__c * Number_of_Hours__c)), (Rate__c * Number_of_Hours__c) )
CustomField.label: Total Cost(Hour)
